column1: DRAFT - FINANCE TEAM VALIDATION REQUIRED BEFORE INVESTOR DISTRIBUTION
Note: Accor Group KSA anchor deal adds ~SAR 300K/month commission from Month 3
Growth rate: 15% MoM months 1-6 | 10% MoM months 7-18 | 7% MoM months 19-36
- Month 3 onwards: Accor Group KSA adds fixed SAR 300K/month commission (included in MRR_SAR)
- Commission rate blended: organic + Accor white-label SDK licensing fees
- MRR_SAR for Month 3+ includes Accor anchor; organic-only MRR in Net_Revenue_SAR column
- LTV_3yr = Annual_Revenue_Per_Customer × Gross_Margin × 3 years × (1 - assumed 15% annual churn)
- Churn Rate assumed: Year 1: 25% | Year 2: 18% | Year 3: 12% (improving with loyalty program)
- Gross Margin improves due to AWS reserved instances + supplier rate renegotiation
- Payback_Months = CAC / (Monthly Revenue Per Customer × Gross Margin)
Note: Seed raise SAR 3M (USD ~800K) received Month 1
- Salaries: Blended ~SAR 12K/head/month (engineers SAR 15K | ops SAR 9K | sales SAR 11K)
- Cash_Balance includes Accor advance payment and compound revenue reinvestment
- AWS costs include RDS + EC2 + CloudFront CDN + S3 storage for media
- Office_Other includes legal retainer SAR 3K/mo + insurance + misc
